summary: iOS | Free 60 artwork missing, and update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working (Studio iOS or PTT)
scenario: Poly Voyager Free 60+ device artwork missing and firmware update fails from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest on Poly Studio Mobile iOS app
description_clean: On iOS, the Poly Voyager Free 60+ artwork is missing in the app, and firmware update from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version fails when using Studio iOS or PTT.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
2. Navigate to Home screen and verify the device artwork for Poly Voyager Free 60+ is displayed.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Poly Voyager Free 60+] → Firmware Update.
4. Attempt to update firmware from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version.
expected: 1. The Poly Voyager Free 60+ device artwork is displayed correctly on the Home screen. 2. Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version completes successfully.
actual: 1. The Poly Voyager Free 60+ artwork is missing in the app. 2. Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version fails when using Studio iOS or PTT.
